Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The events are from multiple patient cases but without explicit case IDs

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to group them based on attributes like timestamp activity department patient age patient gender and additional info

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: The events come from multiple patient cases without explicit case IDs

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Need to group them using attributes like timestamp activity department patient age and patient gender plus additional info

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Events include patient registrations with details like age gender and insurance eg 45M private 62F public

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Activities cover registration triage consultations imaging lab tests surgeries and discharges spanning departments like ER Surgery and Radiology

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Each event links to patients via age gender and additional info such as triage codes or surgery types

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Matched events to patients using unique combinations of age gender and other details eg 45M with ER triage and X ray

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Examples include 45M with hairline fracture 62F with minor infection and 28M undergoing knee surgery

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Discharges show follow up plans like outpatient clinic for 45M or physiotherapy for 28M
